name: io.github.chrischall/ofw-mcp
description: OurFamilyWizard co-parenting for Claude — messages, calendar, expenses, and journal

environmentVariables.name: OFW_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Your OurFamilyWizard login email address. Optional — if omitted, the server falls back to the fetchproxy browser extension (requires being signed in to ourfamilywizard.com).

environmentVariables.name: OFW_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Your OurFamilyWizard password. Optional — see OFW_USERNAME.

environmentVariables.name: OFW_WRITE_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Write-tool gate: "none" registers no write tools; "drafts" registers draft-level writes only (save/delete drafts, upload attachments); "all" registers everything (default). Unrecognized values fail closed to "none".

environmentVariables.name: OFW_CALENDAR_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to register calendar write tools (create/update/delete event) in "drafts" write mode. Events have no draft stage but are reversible. Never overrides "none".
